title: Opsin
description: Opsin evaluates enterprise AI deployments by analyzing real-world AI interactions to uncover data exposure, permission drift, prompt manipulation, and misuse scenarios, supporting ongoing AI risk detection, visibility, and governance across copilots and agents.
